name: Dialla's Malefaction
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Duration Gems
You take 50% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes
explicitMods: Gems can be Socketed in this Item ignoring Socket Colour
Gems Socketed in Red Sockets have +2 to Level
Gems Socketed in Green Sockets have +30% to Quality
Gems Socketed in Blue Sockets gain 100% increased Experience
flavourText: He took me by my hand, promised me power beyond compare.
But I did not do it for power.
I did it for love.
And I'd do it again in an instant.

socketedItems.secDescrText: A bloody scythe swipes across a selected area, applying a physical damage over time debuff and hitting enemies with physical damage. If any survive, you gain a blood charge which raises the damage and cost of the skill. Players can have 5 maximum blood charges.
explicitMods: Deals 2002.5 Base Physical Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect

Gain a Blood Charge if this Skill Hits Enemies and none of them Die
Lose a Blood Charge when an Enemy Dies while affected by this Skill's Debuff
Costs 20% more Life per Blood Charge
Deals 20% more Damage per Blood Charge
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Deals 3881.5 Base Physical Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
Modifiers to Skill Effect Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention
Effects of Boiling Blood Linger for 2 seconds
Deals +5% more Damage per Blood Charge
Grants up to maximum Blood Charges
hybrid.secDescrText: Bloody scythes swipe around a selected area, hitting enemies with physical damage. An area of boiling blood is left beneath them for a duration which deals physical damage over time. Also gives a bonus to maximum Blood Charges for a secondary duration.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Draws out your own blood to power a buff for a duration, letting this skill inflict the Corrupting Blood debuff on enemies you hit, dealing physical damage over time for a short secondary duration. The buff's duration will be refreshed if you spend enough life before it expires.
explicitMods: Deals 379 Base Physical Damage per second
Buff Duration is refreshed after you spend a total of 210 Life

flavourText: "Although we are two bodies, we are of one mind, one heart, drifting
through the cosmos, in search of purpose. The moment we cross paths,
both fleeting and eternal, our eyes are opened to our potential."

binds in both directions.

name: Foulborn Berek's Respite
enchantMods: Your Meteor Towers create Burning Ground for 3 seconds on Hit
explicitMods: Adds 27 to 55 Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
When you Kill an Ignited Enemy, inflict an equivalent Ignite on each nearby Enemy

Shocked Enemies you Kill Explode, dealing 6% of
their Life as Lightning Damage which cannot Shock
flavourText: "With Flame licking at his heels
Berek berated the clouds
Until vengeful Storm spewed forth his rains
And Berek held on tight
As Fire screamed and steamed
And fled."
- Berek and the Untamed

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown

flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

flavourText: "Hate? You speak to me of hate? You have no idea what your persecution inflicts.
How it chokes the heart. Withers the soul. Judge me, and you judge yourself."
- Saresh, last words, to Sekhema Orbala

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base Burning Damage is 30.8% of Overkill Damage
Buff grants 20% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage

The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Once activated, continuously spends mana to cause volleys of ethereal weapons rain from the sky around you, dealing damage to enemies they impact. This skill cannot be triggered or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
